subcodes.first_line: O ye spiritual friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Your letter was received. Praise be to God that it brought tidings of the health and well-being of the true friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی عبدالبهاء نامه شما رسید الحمد لله بشارت صحت و سلامت دوستان حقیقی
subcodes.subjects: @supreme tribunal, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @war and peace, @law of burial and cremation
